title: Getting Started with React + Vite in 2024
excerpt: Vite has quickly become the go-to build tool for modern React apps. Here's everything you need to know to get up and running fast.

title: Deploying a Static React Site to AWS S3 + CloudFront
excerpt: A step-by-step walkthrough of deploying your Vite-built React app to Amazon S3 with CloudFront as a CDN and Route 53 for custom domains.

title: 10 Tailwind CSS Tricks I Wish I Knew Earlier
excerpt: After building dozens of UIs with Tailwind, I've collected the patterns and utilities that make the biggest difference in day-to-day development.
